---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
classes: page-rnd
toc: false
---

```{=html}

<div class="rnd-wrapper">
  
  <h1 class="rnd-header">Research & Publications</h1>

  <div class="timeline">

    <div class="timeline-block">
      <div class="timeline-year">2024</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">A literature review into leadership styles discussed in mining industry</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong>, K.P. Abraham, M. Anand</div>
          <div class="pub-journal">International Journal of Mining and Mineral Engineering, 15(4), 379 - 395.</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: NA</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: Q4</span>
            <span class="badge type">International</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <a href="[https://doi.org/10.1504/IJMME.2024.142842](https://doi.org/10.1504/IJMME.2024.142842)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</a>
            <a href="[https://www.inderscienceonline.com/doi/epdf/10.1504/IJMME.2024.142842](https://www.inderscienceonline.com/doi/epdf/10.1504/IJMME.2024.142842)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</a>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">AI/ML Framework for Enhancing Slope Stability Monitoring with Early Warning Alarm System in Open-Pit Mines</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong>, K.P. Abraham</div>
          <div class="pub-journal">Proceedings of International Conference on Mining and Beneficiation Technology (MBT), Jamshedpur, India.</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: NA</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">National</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-block">
      <div class="timeline-year">2018</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Forecasting of mobile phone services subscription in a saturating market</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong></div>
          <div class="pub-journal">International Journal of Statistics and Applied Mathematics, 3(4), 184-189.</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: NA</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">National</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <a href="[https://www.mathsjournal.com/pdf/2018/vol3issue4/PartB/3-4-20-625.pdf](https://www.mathsjournal.com/pdf/2018/vol3issue4/PartB/3-4-20-625.pdf)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</a>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-block">
      <div class="timeline-year">2016</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Forecasting tourist in-flow in South East Asia: A case of Singapore</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong>, S. Sharma</div>
          <div class="pub-journal">Tourism & Management Studies, 12(1), 107–119.</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: 21</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: Q1</span>
            <span class="badge type">International</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <a href="[https://doi.org/10.18089/tms.2016.12111](https://doi.org/10.18089/tms.2016.12111)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</a>
            <a href="[https://www.tmstudies.net/index.php/ectms/article/view/718/2381](https://www.tmstudies.net/index.php/ectms/article/view/718/2381)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</a>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Public transport service quality and passenger satisfaction: A case of UPSRTC, Agra, India</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong>, V. Anand, A. Shrivastava</div>
          <div class="pub-journal">Pacific Business Review International, 8(11), 82–92.</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: 12</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">National</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <a href="[https://www.pbr.co.in/2016/2016_month/May/11.pdf](https://www.pbr.co.in/2016/2016_month/May/11.pdf)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</a>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Stress at work & employee's satisfaction: Study on private institutions and universities in Northern India</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong>, K. Anand, A. Shrivastava</div>
          <div class="pub-journal">Pacific Business Review International, 8(3), 51–56.</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: 3</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">National</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <a href="[https://www.pbr.co.in/2015/2015_month/Sep/6.pdf](https://www.pbr.co.in/2015/2015_month/Sep/6.pdf)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</a>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-block">
      <div class="timeline-year">2014</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">An application of time series ARIMA forecasting model for predicting sugarcane production in India</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong>, M. Anand</div>
          <div class="pub-journal">Studies in Business and Economics, 9(1), 81–94.</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: 182</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: Q3</span>
            <span class="badge type">International</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <a href="[https://magazines.ulbsibiu.ro/eccsf/RePEc/blg/journl/918kumar&anand.pdf](https://magazines.ulbsibiu.ro/eccsf/RePEc/blg/journl/918kumar&anand.pdf)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</a>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-block">
      <div class="timeline-year">2013</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Assessing financial health of a firm using Altman’s original and revised Z-score models: A case of Kingfisher Airlines Ltd (India)</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong>, M. Anand</div>
          <div class="pub-journal">Journal of Applied Management and Investments, 2(1), 36-48.</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: 35</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">International</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <a href="[https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Manoj_Kumar458/publication/281775693_Kumar_and_Anand_-_Assessing_Financial_Health_Of_A_Firm_Using_Altman'S_Original_And_Revised_Z-Score_Models_A_Case_Of_Kingfisher_Airlines_Ltd_India/links/55f7eb6008aec948c47539e4.pdf](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Manoj_Kumar458/publication/281775693_Kumar_and_Anand_-_Assessing_Financial_Health_Of_A_Firm_Using_Altman'S_Original_And_Revised_Z-Score_Models_A_Case_Of_Kingfisher_Airlines_Ltd_India/links/55f7eb6008aec948c47539e4.pdf)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</a>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Factors affecting tax payers’ decisions in saving tax by investing in tax saving bonds: A study in U.P. State, India</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong></div>
          <div class="pub-journal">Journal of Financial Assets and Investing.</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: 1</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">International</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <a href="[https://doi.org/10.5817/FAI2014-1-2](https://doi.org/10.5817/FAI2014-1-2)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</a>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">A book review on "Marketing Research: A Practical Approach"</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong></div>
          <div class="pub-journal">Serbian Journal of Management, 8(1).</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: NA</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: Q4</span>
            <span class="badge type">International</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <a href="[https://www.sjm06.com/SJM%20ISSN1452-4864/8_1_2013_May_1_132/8_1_2013_113-115.pdf](https://www.sjm06.com/SJM%20ISSN1452-4864/8_1_2013_May_1_132/8_1_2013_113-115.pdf)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</a>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Critical attributes in service quality & passenger satisfaction: An empirical study of UPSRTC in Agra District</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong>, M. Anand</div>
          <div class="pub-journal">Adarsh Journal of Management Research. 6(2), 4–16.</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: NA</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">National</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <a href="[https://doi.org/10.21095/ajmr/2013/v6/i2/88257](https://doi.org/10.21095/ajmr/2013/v6/i2/88257)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</a>
            <a href="[https://www.adarshjournals.in/index.php/ajmr/article/view/88257/67261](https://www.adarshjournals.in/index.php/ajmr/article/view/88257/67261)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</a>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Analyzing tax payers’ investment interests in tax free bonds in Uttar Pradesh (West)</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong></div>
          <div class="pub-journal">MSR Management Review, 4(2).</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: NA</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">National</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Exploring EVA® and dividend payout relation: A case of Reliance Infrastructure Ltd</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong>, A. Malhotra</div>
          <div class="pub-journal">Journal of GNA-IMT.</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: NA</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">National</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-block">
      <div class="timeline-year">2011</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Testing of IPO underpricing inefficiency at Dhaka Stock Exchange</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong></div>
          <div class="pub-journal">MSR Management Review, 3(2).</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: NA</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">National</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-block">
      <div class="timeline-year">Prior</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Hyderabad House’s franchisee operating model (Interview case)</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong>, N. Chandrakar</div>
          <div class="pub-journal">IBS Case Development Centre (2009).</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: NA</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">National</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</span>
            <a href="[https://www.ibscdc.org/video-interview/Zubair-Ahmed.asp](https://www.ibscdc.org/video-interview/Zubair-Ahmed.asp)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Maintenance information in mines using Visual Basic as a tool</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong>, A. N. Sinha</div>
          <div class="pub-journal">Proceedings of Third Indian Conference on Computer Application in Mineral Industry (ICCAMI-2001), New Delhi.</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: NA</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">National</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</span>
            <a href="[https://books.google.co.in/books/about/Computer_Applications_in_Mineral_Industr.html?id=f4Y7AAAACAAJ&redir_esc=y](https://books.google.co.in/books/about/Computer_Applications_in_Mineral_Industr.html?id=f4Y7AAAACAAJ&redir_esc=y)" target="_blank" class="pub-link"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pub-card">
          <h3 class="pub-title">Maintenance information management</h3>
          <div class="pub-authors"><strong>Manoj Kumar</strong>, A. N. Sinha</div>
          <div class="pub-journal">Proceedings of National Seminar on Maintenance Engineering (2001).</div>
          <div class="pub-badges">
            <span class="badge citations">Citations: NA</span>
            <span class="badge scopus">Scopus: NA</span>
            <span class="badge type">National</span>
          </div>
          <div class="pub-actions">
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View DOI</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download PDF</span>
            <span class="pub-disabled"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> View Link</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>


```
